title: nashah #5382
definition:
1) to forget, deprive
    1a) (Qal) to forget
    1b) (Niphal) to be forgotten
    1c) (Piel) to cause to forget
    1d) (Hiphil) to cause to forget, allow to be forgotten
nasbUsage:
